title: That one got tense - Heckingbottom
summary: That one got tense - Heckingbottom. Preston North End manager Paul Heckingbottom says his team had to fight for three points on a poor Deepdale surface.. Preston manager Paul Heckingbottom praised his...
content:
Preston manager Paul Heckingbottom praised his team for scrapping their way to three points on a poor Deepdale surface against Portsmouth.
